items.hook: Happy to help you narrow this down.
items.bridge: For a nail booking, the style direction, time window, and whether removal is needed matter more than a quick yes or no.
items.next_step: Ask for style direction, preferred time, and whether the user needs removal.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user replies with booking facts.

items.hook: That is totally normal for a first visit.
items.bridge: A lot of first-time nail clients do not need more options, they need a simple way to narrow what fits their life and schedule.
items.next_step: Acknowledge the uncertainty and ask whether the user wants something daily, event-ready, or more eye-catching plus the time window.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user shares style and timing.

items.hook: We can keep this simple and work from your event timing first.
items.bridge: When an event is close, the date, slot, and whether you already have old nails on matter more than a long style lecture.
items.next_step: Ask when the event is, when the user can come in, and whether removal is needed.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher once the user shares timing facts.

items.hook: I can help make the price answer more useful.
items.bridge: For nails, the real price often changes with style, removal, length, and add-ons, so one quick scope question helps a lot.
items.next_step: Ask whether the user wants a basic set, an event set, or a redo with removal.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user shares scope.

items.hook: Nice to see you back here.
items.bridge: For returning nail clients, it helps to start from what they want to refresh, change, or keep this time instead of restarting from zero.
items.next_step: Ask what they liked last time and what they want to change this time, plus when they hope to come in.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to FollowUp or Catcher depending on the user's reply.

items.hook: We can keep this easy and low-pressure.
items.bridge: Some nail concerns feel more personal than they look in a comment, so the goal is to stay helpful without making the user feel exposed.
items.next_step: Reply with empathy and lightly invite the user to share style direction and timing.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user continues with details.
